name: @ont/web
description: ONT B5 surface — the explorer/web (clean-build). READ/DISPLAY ONLY: no keys, no signing, no crypto libs. Consumes the B4 adapters through a narrow injected read-port and renders served state as HTML with resolver-indexed-mirror / not-ownership-authority copy; reimplements no resolver/indexer/consensus rules. See docs/core/B5_WEB_CLASSIFICATION.md.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && vitest run
